title: Foo's Food
description: Foo's take of food items. Vanilla friendly!
body:
### Redraws of all food and food related items!

![Food Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43fca6612dc069101196da8476805b3cfb555bf9.png)

### Comparison

![Food Items Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae5c26365663e68b6e4145ea62684b3ae5b153bf.png)

Enjoy!

I have other textures that I will add on a future resource pack but in the meantime you can check my works on:
